title: MheSchedulerActive-PassiveConfig
fullText: Configuring MHE Schedulers as Active-Passive WMS Instance which is designated as "Active" for MHE Schedulers No change in to in  server1.manh.com   in   ILSStartup.def.xml WMS Instance which is designated as "Passive" for MHE Schedulers Edit  ILSStartup.def.xml  by renaming the MHE Schedulers by adding a preceding text "Passive" in file  ILSStartup.def.xml  in the "name" of scheduler entries .   Any text could be used as preceding text, for the sake of we keep "Passive". <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEInboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheinbound.scheduler.MHEInboundScheduler" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_INBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "10"   />   <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheoutbound.schedular.MHEOutboundSchedular" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_OUTBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "11"   /> WMS Instance(s) which are not MHE Instances Edit  ILSStartup.def.xml  by commenting the MHE Scheduler entries as below. <!--   <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEInboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheinbound.scheduler.MHEInboundScheduler" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_INBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "10"   /> -->   <!-- <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheoutbound.schedular.MHEOutboundSchedular" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_OUTBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "11"   /> --> DB updates for Active/Passive MHE schedulers in WMS DB Inserts/updates in Param Def table (WMS Schema) Replace server1.manh.com:12000 with Passive server nodes. --Below 2 inserts are for Passive Schedulers INSERT   INTO   PARAM_DEF    (PARAM_DEF_ ID,PARAM _GROUP_ID,PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID,PARAM_NAME,DESCRIPTION,IS_DISABLED,IS_REQUIRED,DATA_TYPE,UI_TYPE,MIN_VALUE,IS_MIN_INC,MAX_VALUE,     IS_MAX_ INC,DFLT _VALUE,DISPLAY_ORDER,VALUE_GENERATOR_CLASS,IS_LOCALIZABLE,PARAM_CATEGORY,CARR_DFLT_VALUE,BP_DFLT_VALUE,PARAM_VALIDATOR_CLASS)    SELECT   'PassiveMHEInboundSchedulerTrigger' , 'COM_WM' , 'SHIPPING' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Inbound' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Inbound' ,           0, 0, 4,  'TEXTBOX' ,  NULL , 0,  NULL , 0, 'server1.manh.com:12000' , 1,  NULL , 0,  'null' ,  NULL ,  NULL ,   NULL      FROM   dual     WHERE   NOT   EXISTS     ( SELECT   1              FROM   param_def             WHERE   PARAM_DEF_ID =  ' PassiveMHEInboundSchedulerTrigger '               AND   PARAM_GROUP_ID =  'COM_WM'               AND   PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID =  'SHIPPING' ); INSERT   INTO   PARAM_DEF    (PARAM_DEF_ID, PARAM_GROUP_ID, PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID, PARAM_NAME, DESCRIPTION, IS_ DISABLED,IS _REQUIRED, DATA_TYPE, UI_TYPE, MIN_VALUE, IS_MIN_INC,MAX_VALUE,     IS_MAX_INC, DFLT_VALUE, DISPLAY_ ORDER,VALUE _GENERATOR_CLASS, IS_LOCALIZABLE, PARAM_CATEGORY,CARR_DFLT_VALUE,BP_DFLT_VALUE,PARAM_VALIDATOR_CLASS)    SELECT   'PassiveMHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger' , 'COM_WM' , 'SHIPPING' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Outbound' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Outbound' ,           0, 0, 4,  'TEXTBOX' ,  NULL , 0,  NULL , 0,  'server1.manh.com:12000' , 1,  NULL , 0, 'null ' , NULL , NULL , NULL      FROM   dual     WHERE   NOT   EXISTS     ( SELECT   1              FROM   param_def             WHERE   PARAM_DEF_ID =  ' PassiveMHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger '               AND   PARAM_GROUP_ID =  'COM_WM'               AND   PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID =  'SHIPPING' );     --Below 2 inserts are for Active Schedulers INSERT   INTO   PARAM_DEF    (PARAM_DEF_ID, PARAM_GROUP_ID, PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID, PARAM_ NAME,DESCRIPTION ,IS_DISABLED,IS_REQUIRED, DATA_TYPE, UI_TYPE,MIN_VALUE,IS_MIN_INC,MAX_VALUE,     IS_MAX_ INC,DFLT _VALUE,DISPLAY_ORDER,VALUE_GENERATOR_CLASS,IS_LOCALIZABLE, PARAM_CATEGORY,CARR_DFLT_VALUE,BP_DFLT_VALUE,PARAM_VALIDATOR_CLASS)    SELECT   ' MHEInboundSchedulerTrigger ' , ' COM_WM' , 'SHIPPING' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Inbound' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Inbound' ,           0, 0, 4, 'TEXTBOX' ,  NULL , 0, NULL , 0, NULL , 1, NULL , 0, 'null' , NULL ,  NULL , NULL      FROM   dual     WHERE   NOT   EXISTS ( SELECT   1              FROM   param_def             WHERE   PARAM_DEF_ID =  ' MHEInboundSchedulerTrigger '               AND   PARAM_GROUP_ID =  'COM_WM'               AND   PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID =  'SHIPPING' ); INSERT   INTO   PARAM_DEF    (PARAM_DEF_ID, PARAM_GROUP_ ID,PARAM _SUBGROUP_ID,PARAM_NAME,DESCRIPTION,IS_DISABLED,IS_REQUIRED,DATA_TYPE,UI_TYPE,MIN_VALUE,IS_MIN_INC,MAX_VALUE,IS_MAX_INC,     DFLT_ VALUE,DISPLAY _ORDER,VALUE_GENERATOR_CLASS,IS_LOCALIZABLE, PARAM_CATEGORY,CARR_DFLT_VALUE,BP_DFLT_VALUE, PARAM_VALIDATOR_CLASS)    SELECT   ' MHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger ' , ' COM_WM' , 'SHIPPING' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Outbound' , 'Peer Failover Information for MHE Outbound' ,           0, 0,4, 'TEXTBOX ' , NULL , 0, NULL ,0,  NULL ,1, NULL ,0, 'null' , NULL , NULL , NULL      FROM   dual     WHERE   NOT   EXISTS ( SELECT   1              FROM   param_def             WHERE   PARAM_DEF_ID =  ' MHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger '               AND   PARAM_GROUP_ID =  'COM_WM'               AND   PARAM_SUBGROUP_ID =  'SHIPPING' );   COMMIT ;

Configuring MHE Schedulers as Active-Passive WMS Instance which is designated as "Active" for MHE Schedulers No change in to in  server1.manh.com   in   ILSStartup.def.xml WMS Instance which is designated as "Passive" for MHE Schedulers Edit  ILSStartup.def.xml  by renaming the MHE Schedulers by adding a preceding text "Passive" in file  ILSStartup.def.xml  in the "name" of scheduler entries .   Any text could be used as preceding text, for the sake of we keep "Passive". <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEInboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheinbound.scheduler.MHEInboundScheduler" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_INBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "10"   />   <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheoutbound.schedular.MHEOutboundSchedular" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_OUTBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "11"   /> WMS Instance(s) which are not MHE Instances Edit  ILSStartup.def.xml  by commenting the MHE Scheduler entries as below. <!--   <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEInboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheinbound.scheduler.MHEInboundScheduler" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_INBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "10"   /> -->   <!-- <startup- class   name= " PassiveMHEOutboundSchedulerTrigger " class = " com.manh .wmos.services.mheoutbound.schedular.MHEOutboundSchedular" arguments= " intervalInSeconds =1, queueName = jms.queue.WM _MHE_OUTBOUND_QUEUE " failure-fatal= "false"   order= "11"   /> --> DB updates for Active/Passive MHE schedulers in WMS DB Inserts/updates in Param Def table (WMS Schema) Replace server1.manh.com:12000 with Passive server nodes.
